productName: Thunder Stix - Tilted-DOH-Glass Tip Preroll (1.2g) / Sour Lemon Drop
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Sour Lemon Drop and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
